'''Jiramma''' was a [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] clan that operated from [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]]. [[Darga Jiramma Mionne]] was a member of it.

==Organization==
Jiramma was one of the [[Clans of the Ancients]], the elite [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] [[Kajidic/Legends|kajidics]] that could trace their ancestry back to the Hutt [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] [[Varl/Legends|Varl]], and was accorded the right to a seat on the [[Grand Hutt Council/Legends|Hutt Grand Council]].<ref name="LoNH" />

The clan's [[Throneworld/Legends|throneworld]] was [[Kor Jiramma]] within the ''[[Bootana Hutta]]'' region of [[Hutt Space/Legends|Hutt Space]], while the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]] served as its primary base of operations. The clan also had spheres of influence on the [[Planet/Legends|planets]] [[Cato Neimoidia/Legends|Cato Neimoidia]] and [[Sleheyron/Legends|Sleheyron]], and also on [[Kwenn Space Station/Legends|Kwenn Space Station]].<ref name="LoNH" />

==History==
During the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], Jiramma had close ties to [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. It also regularly partnered with the [[Vanderijar]] kajidic when conducting non-Imperial business.<ref name="LoNH" />
